seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between West Lyons River and West Perth. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: West Lyons River vs West Perth: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in West Lyons River and West Perth.
heading: West Lyons River vs West Perth — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between West Lyons River, Western Australia and West Perth, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: West Lyons River has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to West Perth (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is West Lyons River or West Perth safer from flooding?
faq.answer: West Lyons River has a flood risk score of 29/100, while West Perth scores 35/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: West Lyons River scores 49/100 for bushfire risk. West Perth scores 35/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in West Lyons River or West Perth?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. West Lyons River has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.75% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
